have h₁ : ∃ r, mul lhs rhs = Ok r := by sorry
  obtain ⟨r, hr⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ : Field51_as_Nat r ≡ (Field51_as_Nat lhs) * (Field51_as_Nat rhs) [MOD p] := by sorry
  have h₃ : ∀ i < 5, r[i]!.val < 2 ^ 52 := by sorry
  exact ⟨r, hr, h₂, h₃⟩

have h_main : ∃ (r : Array U64 5#usize), mul lhs rhs = ok r ∧ Field51_as_Nat r ≡ (Field51_as_Nat lhs) * (Field51_as_Nat rhs) [MOD p] ∧ (∀ i < 5, r[i]!.val < 2 ^ 52) := by
    use 0
    <;> simp_all [mul]
    <;>
    (try decide) <;>
    (try

        simp_all [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]

        norm_num <;>
        omega

    (try

        aesop
      }) <;>
    (try
      {
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        omega

    <;>

      })
  
  obtain ⟨r, hr⟩ := h_main
